name: Button
summary: Theme-aware action button with `variant` (filled/outlined/plain), semantic `intent`, and `size`; reach for it for any primary or secondary click action, and use `IconButton` instead when the control is icon-only.

name: Checkbox
summary: Accessible boolean checkbox for a single on/off choice, with an optional `label` + `helperText` and an `indeterminate` (mixed) state; controlled via `checked` + `onValueChange`, or auto-bound to a `FormControl` with `name` (keep `bindForm` to opt a form-bound box out of writing the store). A real hidden native input backs it for forms/AT.

name: DateSelector
summary: Interactive month calendar for picking a single date or a `range`; emits/accepts timezone-safe ISO `YYYY-MM-DD` strings, with display localized via `locale` and `firstDayOfWeek` (the value contract stays ISO Latin digits).

name: FormControl
summary: Wraps a form to provide a typed store context that field components bind to by `name`; use it to collect and submit grouped field values without lifting every field into local state. Also carries form-wide config — `disabled`, name-keyed `errors`, and an async-submit busy state — shared with bound fields via `useFormConfig()`.

name: IconButton
summary: Compact icon-only button (same `variant`/`intent`/`size` system as Button); use it for toolbar and inline actions, and always supply an `aria-label` since there is no visible text.

name: Iterator
summary: Numeric stepper with plus/minus buttons and scroll-wheel support for bounded integer/decimal input; use it for small quantity-style values (counts, steps) where a full slider or text field is overkill.

name: Option
summary: The `Select.Option` element (exported as `Option`): one selectable choice with a `value` and label children, authored as a direct child of `Select`.

name: MetroSelect
summary: Windows-8-Metro-style grid of flat, sharp-cornered tiles (`MetroSelect.Option`) for single or `multiple` selection; controlled by `value` + `onValueChange`. Tiles snap into a tight grid with a small default gutter, tilt in 3D on press, and accept a per-option `color` + `wide` 2×1 module — use it when options benefit from icons/imagery rather than a compact dropdown.

name: MetroSelect.Option
summary: A single flat Metro tile inside a `MetroSelect`, identified by `value` with icon/label children; author one per choice as a direct `MetroSelect` child — the parent owns selection state. Accepts a flat `color` fill and `wide` (2×1) module.

name: RadioGroup
summary: Single-choice group of `Radio` options with keyboard roving focus; controlled via `value` + `onValueChange` or bound to a `FormControl` by `name`, with `gap` for option spacing. Disable the whole group with `disabled` (a FormControl's form-wide `disabled` / name-keyed `errors` also reach it); option colours follow the theme intent contract (consistent with Checkbox).

name: Radio
summary: A single radio option rendered inside a `RadioGroup`; author it as a `RadioGroup` child rather than standalone — the group owns selection, keyboard roving focus, and form binding.

name: Select
summary: Fully-typed dropdown for single or `multiple` choice from `Select.Option` children; controlled via `value` + `onValueChange` and FormControl-aware — use it for compact pick-one(-or-many) lists, and prefer `MetroSelect` when options need a visual tile grid.

name: Select.Option
summary: A single option inside a `Select`, carrying its `value` and label children; author one per choice as a direct `Select` child — it forwards `className`/`style`/`id`/`data-*` onto the rendered `<li>`.

name: Slider
summary: Theme-aware draggable slider for selecting a number within `min`/`max` (optionally snapped to `step`); use it for continuous or coarse-grained ranges where the approximate value matters more than an exact typed number.

name: Switch
summary: Accessible toggle for a single boolean that takes effect immediately; controlled via `checked` + `onValueChange` — prefer it over Checkbox for instant on/off settings rather than form submission.

name: TextField
summary: Single- or multi-line text input with `label`/`helperText`/`error`+`errorText`, `size`, and a `width` model; controlled via `value` + `onChange` or auto-bound to a `FormControl` by `name`. Colours follow the theme intent contract (consistent with Button/Checkbox) and it fills its container's width by default. The default for free-form text entry.

name: Accordion
summary: Vertical stack of collapsible `Accordion.Item` panels with single or `multiple` open behavior and roving-focus ARIA; control which panels are open with `expanded`/`defaultExpanded`/`onExpandedChange`.

name: Accordion.Item
summary: One collapsible panel inside an `Accordion`, supplying its header and body content; author items as direct `Accordion` children — the parent owns open/closed state, focus, and ARIA wiring.

name: AppBar
summary: Top application bar for branding, navigation, and page-level actions; it sits below modal overlays in the z-index scale and intent-tints its surface — use one per screen as the persistent header.

name: Box
summary: Polymorphic (`as`) workhorse container with spacing, `sx`, and `alignX` content alignment; reach for it as the default building block when no more specialized layout primitive (Stack, Grid, Panel) fits.

name: Drawer
summary: Panel that slides in from an `anchor` edge (`left`/`right`/`top`/`bottom`, or RTL-aware `start`/`end`); non-`persistent` drawers are true focus-trapping dialogs, so supply `aria-label`/`aria-labelledby` — use it for side navigation and contextual panels.

name: Grid
summary: Two-dimensional CSS-grid container. Lay out equal columns (`columns`, responsive), or an auto-fit/fill card grid with no breakpoints (`minColWidth`), with token-aware `gap`/`gapX`/`gapY`, `align`/`justifyItems`, and `equalize` to fill children to their cell. Responsive props compile to CSS @media (no <Surface>); use `GridItem` for per-cell `span`/`rowSpan`/`colStart`. Prefer `Stack` for one-directional flow and `Table` for data.

name: GridItem
summary: Per-cell placement inside a `Grid` — `span` (column span), `rowSpan`, and `colStart`, each responsive (a breakpoint map compiles to CSS @media). Wrap a child in GridItem to make it occupy multiple tracks; bare Grid children remain valid 1×1 cells. Polymorphic via `as`.

name: List
summary: Accessible vertical list of items with optional `selectionMode='single'` (keyed by `getItemKey`) and drag `onReorder`; use it for simple selectable/reorderable item collections, and reach for `Table` when you need columns or `Tree` for hierarchy.

name: Modal
summary: Centered focus-trapping dialog rendered above a backdrop, controlled by `open`/`onClose`; use it for confirmations and focused tasks that must interrupt the page — reach for `Drawer` when the panel should slide from an edge.

name: Panel
summary: Bordered, padded surface card for grouping related content into a visually distinct section; supports `normalizeRowHeights` for equal-height children — use it to frame a block, and `Box` for an unstyled container.

name: Stack
summary: Flexbox container that lays children out in one `direction` (column/row) with consistent `gap`, token-aware `align`/`justify`, per-axis `gapX`/`gapY`, a `divider`, and responsive (breakpoint-map) props that compile to CSS @media — no <Surface> needed. The default choice for one-dimensional flow; use `Grid` for two-dimensional layouts. Sugar: `HStack`, `VStack`, `Center`, `Cluster`, `Spacer`.

name: HStack
summary: Horizontal `Stack` (`direction='row'`) that centers its children on the cross axis by default — the zero-config shape for rows of avatars, buttons, icons, and labels. Accepts every Stack prop except `direction`; use `<Spacer/>` or `justify` to distribute, `gap` for spacing.

name: VStack
summary: Vertical `Stack` (`direction='column'`) — an explicit, readable alias for the most common column flow. Accepts every Stack prop except `direction`; children stretch on the cross axis by default.

name: Center
summary: A `Stack` that centers its children on BOTH axes (`align='center'` + `justify='center'`) — the one-shot answer to "center this in its space". Both defaults are overridable; set `direction='row'` to center a row instead of a column.

name: Cluster
summary: A wrapping horizontal `Stack` (`direction='row'`, `wrap`, cross-axis centered) for variable-length groups that should flow onto multiple lines — tag lists, chip sets, filter pills, button bars. Accepts every Stack prop except `direction`.

name: Spacer
summary: A flexible, `aria-hidden` filler that absorbs free space inside a `Stack` (any direction), pushing siblings apart — the typed replacement for `sx={{ flexGrow: 1 }}` / margin-auto hacks in toolbars and bars. `grow` sets how much space it takes (default 1).

name: Surface
summary: Per-route root container that establishes the theme, density spacing, writing `dir`, and font-loading gate; wrap each top-level screen in exactly one Surface — most valet components require an ancestor Surface and will throw without it.

name: Tabs
summary: Tabbed interface with `Tabs.Tab` triggers and `Tabs.Panel` content and full `tablist` ARIA; controlled via `value`/`onValueChange` — use it to switch between sibling views in the same region.

name: Tabs.Tab
summary: A clickable tab trigger inside `Tabs`, identified by `value`; pair each one with a matching `Tabs.Panel` of the same value — the parent `Tabs` owns the active selection and `tablist` ARIA.

name: Tabs.Panel
summary: The content region for one tab inside `Tabs`, identified by the `value` of its matching `Tabs.Tab`; only the active panel is shown — author one per tab as a direct `Tabs` child.

name: Avatar
summary: Circular user image from `src`, falling back to initials; Gravatar lookup is opt-in via `gravatar` (off by default — no email hash leaves the browser without it). Use it for profile pictures and identity chips.

name: Divider
summary: Theme-aware horizontal or vertical rule with spacing ergonomics; use it to separate content sections or list items without drawing your own border.

name: Icon
summary: Renders an Iconify icon by name (`icon`) or a safe inline SVG (`svg`); arbitrary SVG strings go through an allowlist parser, so use the explicit `dangerouslySetSvg` escape hatch only for trusted full-SVG markup. Size and color follow the surrounding text.

name: Image
summary: Theme-aware `` wrapper with sizing and object-fit ergonomics for static raster/vector images; use it for content imagery, and `Avatar` for circular user pictures or `Video` for playable media.

name: ProgressBar
summary: Horizontal linear progress track; pass a 0–100 `value` for determinate progress or omit it for an indeterminate sweep — the preferred primitive for inline loading and completion bars.

name: ProgressRing
summary: Circular progress indicator; pass a 0–100 `value` for determinate progress or omit it for an indeterminate spinner, with an optional `label` in the center — the preferred primitive for compact, radial loading states.

name: Typography
summary: Renders themed text at a semantic `variant` (h1–h6, subtitle, body, button, …) mapped to the correct HTML element; use it for all text so type scale, color, and wrapping stay consistent.

name: Video
summary: Theme-aware video player with lazy loading and fullscreen support; use it for playable media clips, and `Image` for static pictures.

name: WebGLCanvas
summary: DPI-aware WebGL2 canvas that resizes to its parent and runs a render callback on a requestAnimationFrame loop; use it for custom GPU graphics, shaders, and visualizations rather than 2D drawing.

name: Chip
summary: Compact pill showing a label with an optional icon/avatar and a removal action; use it for tags, filters, and selected tokens — provide `onDelete` to make it dismissible.

name: CodeBlock
summary: Syntax-highlighted code block with a copy-to-clipboard button and snackbar feedback; use it to display source snippets — set `language` to match the curated highlight.js set (others fall back to plaintext).

name: Dropzone
summary: Keyboard-accessible drag-and-drop file uploader with previews and rejection handling; read selected files via `onFilesChange` and constrain input with `accept`/`maxFiles` — use it for in-page file intake.

name: KeyModal
summary: Dev-tool modal that captures an AI provider API key for browser-direct LLM calls (`open`/`onClose`); the key is reachable by any script on the page and at-rest encryption is opt-in — never collect production or multi-tenant keys with it.

name: LLMChat
summary: Height-constrained LLM chat surface (role='log', typing/aria-busy) that renders a message list and input; you own the request loop and pass available models via `models` — an experimental widget for prototyping assistant UIs.

name: LoadingBackdrop
summary: Full-area scrim with a centered spinner (`showSpinner`) that overlays content while it loads; render it conditionally to block interaction during an async operation, and toggle `fading` for the exit transition.

name: Markdown
summary: Renders a Markdown string into valet primitives (headings, lists, links, fenced code with highlighting); use it to display AI/CMS output as themed React, not raw HTML.

name: Pagination
summary: Tab-style page navigator with an elastic active-page underline; controlled by `count` + `page` + `onPageChange` — use it to page through large lists or tables.

name: ParallaxScroll
summary: Scroll-tracking container that provides parallax context to its `ParallaxLayer`/`ParallaxBackground` children; wrap a section in it (optionally `trackX` for horizontal) to drive depth effects — the motion auto-disables under reduced-motion.

name: ParallaxLayer
summary: A child layer inside a `ParallaxScroll` that moves at a fractional `speed` (1 = native, <1 slower, >1 faster) along `axis`; stack several at different speeds for depth — displacement neutralizes under reduced-motion.

name: ParallaxBackground
summary: Full-bleed background layer that drifts on scroll for a depth effect; place it inside a `ParallaxScroll` as the backmost layer, and honor reduced-motion (the effect auto-disables) — experimental decorative widget.

name: RichChat
summary: Local chat thread (role='log') whose messages can embed interactive valet content, including forms; use it for guided, in-app conversational flows you drive yourself — experimental, no network built in.

name: Snackbar
summary: Transient toast notification (role='status') that fades in and auto-dismisses, pausing its timer on hover/focus; control with `open`/`message`/`autoHideDuration`, and pick a `variant` (`outline` default or solid `filled`) — use it for brief, non-blocking feedback.

name: SpeedDial
summary: Floating action button that expands a fan of secondary actions with disclosure ARIA; it closes on action/Escape/outside-click and restores focus — use it for a primary action plus a few related shortcuts.

name: Table
summary: Data table with sortable columns, smart height/auto-pagination, and unified `selectionMode` (`'none'|'single'|'multiple'`) keyed by `getItemKey` for selection that survives data refreshes (the `selectable`/`rowKey` props are deprecated aliases); use it for tabular data with columns.

name: Tooltip
summary: CSS-driven hover/focus tooltip that wraps a single child and exposes `title` content via aria-describedby; use it for brief supplementary hints, not essential or interactive content.

name: Tree
summary: Accessible WAI-ARIA tree over a `nodes` hierarchy (label via `getLabel`): `expanded`/`onExpandedChange` for disclosure and the canonical `selectionMode` + `selected`/`onSelectionChange` (id arrays) for `none`/`single`/`multiple` selection. Use it for nested data like file trees and outlines — reach for `List` when items are flat.

name: ValetErrorBoundary
summary: Opt-in React error boundary that catches render errors in its subtree and shows a role='alert' fallback with a `reset()` action; wrap risky regions to stop one component from white-screening the host app.
